name: not_order_ev_upd
drl: rule R when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-140 item #2: a RELEASED P (initial, blocked throughout) UPDATED in the unblock epoch joins the NEWEST batch (last-touch epoch), so it fires BEFORE an earlier-batch insert: [1,2]. Minimal analog of cf401x344's NE7. No P is inserted in the unblock epoch, so the clean-regime reorder applies.
